note: TEMPORARY test config: the same 2x RTX 5060 Ti that live in the 9800X3D build (DeV-X3D, 7-9800x3d-2x5060ti16g-64g-f732) moved into the i7-5960X (Haswell-E, overclocked ~4.3 GHz) on an ASRock X99 Extreme4. Both cards run PCIe 3.0 x8 under load (CPU-fed x8/x8 bifurcation of the 40 lanes); the gen1 x8 in this snapshot is idle power-saving downclock, not the link ceiling. Purpose: measure how the DeV-X3D sweep holds up on an older platform with identical GPUs.
